name: Brown Sugar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-cup tube (Bundt) pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cardamom, and cloves.
4. Add buttermilk, eggs, and melted butter to the dry mixture. Beat well until combined.
5. Stir in chopped pecans if desired.
6. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack or plate.
9. To make the Butterscotch Glaze, combine butter, brown sugar, and milk in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then add powdered sugar and vanilla or rum extract. Beat until smooth. If needed, adjust consistency with more milk for drizzling.
10. Drizzle glaze over the cooled cake.
